extension.summary: Tulip library collection with helper functions for Kodi
extension.description: Tulip library collection with helper functions for Kodi
extension.news:
[B]4.0.X[/B] - New stripped and reworked version from a lot of unnecessary stuff, python 3 only - Add ability to set licence for streams - Directory builder can now add all items at once (performance gain) - Removed progress dialog capability for builder (wasn't particularly effective or useful anyway)
[B]3.1.X[/B] - Update user agent strings - Added a few more utilities - Add offscreen boolean parameter for ListItem - Bug fixes
[B]3.0.X[/B] - Utilize certifi for net module - Add ability to save locally unencrypted m3u8 ts video content - Update user agent strings - Change the way kodi version is obtained - Add limit and username/password auth to net module - Convert url bytes object to string (python 3 only)
